title: Punch Off
description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes:
This event features a dynamic scenario where two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] continuously battle each other in the background while you decide your course of action.

[gold]Nab path:[/gold] Attempting to grab the treasure results in being [red]clocked in the face[/red] by one of the constructs' right hook. You receive an [red]Injury[/red] curse added to your deck and a random [gold]Relic[/gold], then the event ends.

[gold]Fight path:[/gold] Choosing to fight enters a combat encounter against both [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold]. Victory grants a random [gold]Relic[/gold] and [gold]Potion[/gold] as rewards.

The [gold]Nab[/gold] option provides the relic faster but incurs a curse, while [gold]Fight[/gold] offers better total rewards at the cost of an additional combat encounter. Potion removal is disabled during the event.
